daily_summary.headline: Starship Test Flight and Aurora Opportunities Highlight the Day

top_events.title: Starship Flight 12
top_events.description: 12th test flight of the two-stage Starship launch vehicle. Maiden Flight of Starship V3.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for potential historic milestones.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Possible aurora at high latitudes with a Kp index of 4.
top_events.action: Check conditions for aurora visibility at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | CAS500-2 & Others
top_events.description: Ride-share of multiple satellites including CAS500-2 and Pelican satellites.
top_events.action: Tune in for the launch to see the deployment of multiple satellites.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
